task: Steps A-F: nwt embedding complete (6 commits on nwt/embed-v1)
summary: Steps A-F: nwt embedding complete (6 commits on nwt/embed-v1)
reason: Chairman: '我希望内置NWT到flowntier里面，第一次打开Flowntier的时候让用户设置工作目录，然后按任务让AI自己选择创建项目级别的目录（在工作目录下，这里你要加到系统提示词里面）' — 6-commit embedding: (A) TS port of nwt in src/tools/nwt.ts; (B) WorkdirSetup dialog for first-launch workdir picker; (C) Tauri set_workdir/get_workdir + App.tsx first-run gate; (D) Rust nwt_log tool registered in agent-core's ToolRegistry; (E) SYSTEM_PROMPT adds 'AI 主动记录到 NWT' instruction to all 6 roles; (F) per-workflow .nwt/ auto-init (TS side calls initWorkspace on workdir confirm; kvSet('nwt_root', workdir) on workflow start). The nwt TS and Rust implementations write the same JSON format so events are cross-compatible with the upstream nwt CLI. v0.4.0-NWT-rc3 candidate. Step F.5 (deferred): agent loop reads kv.nwt_root and injects into agent-core nwt tool's static; trivial 30-line patch tracked for v0.5.
